steps.title: Join two independent clauses
steps.content: The first clause says the museum was founded to showcase Mohegan Tribe culture and history. The second says that today it is the oldest Native-owned and -operated museum in the country. These clauses need a proper boundary.

steps.title: Reject run-ons and splices
steps.content: Choice B creates a fused sentence with no punctuation. Choice C uses and without the needed comma. Choice D uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. A comma plus coordinating conjunction correctly joins the clauses. The answer is A.
